assertions.text: First confirms target age, subject, and difficulty before generating (simple/guardian-friendly mode).
Produces a coloring page with bold black outlines, white background, and simplified shapes.
Uses an age-appropriate, safety-checked image-generation prompt.

cases.prompt: Make a set of line art coloring pages I can print as a booklet

assertions.text: Generates simplified line-art / coloring pages via Gemini image generation.
Hands off the print-ready PDF binding to office-docs(Core) rather than producing the PDF itself.

cases.prompt: 컬러링 페이지 말고 풀컬러 일러스트로 그려줘

assertions.text: Recognizes a full-color raster illustration is outside this coloring/line-art skill and redirects to the appropriate generation path.
